<pr_description>
MudSelect: Does not show validation error on focus loss
### Before reporting

- [x] I searched existing issues
- [x] I tried in private/incognito browser

### What went wrong?

Hi,

My example code can be found here: https://try.mudblazor.com/snippet/QYwpPPwgBPfgLWSf

I have an issue that MudSelects in custom components and in the main page do not show validation errors when changing focus. The example text field does show a validation error that it is empty the moment you tab out of it without setting a value.

Additionally, you can see that validation does happen, as the text below the form does show that the form is invalid when selections are not made. But fields are not highlighted.

Main page:
```cs
<MudForm @bind-IsValid="@_isFormValid">

    <MudSelect T="string" @bind-Value="_car" Label="Car" Required="true">
        <MudSelectItem T="string" Value="@("City")"></MudSelectItem>
        <MudSelectItem T="string" Value="@("Track")"></MudSelectItem>
        <MudSelectItem T="string" Value="@("Limo")"></MudSelectItem>
    </MudSelect>

    <ColorSelector @bind-Color="_color"/>

    <MudTextField @bind-Value="_text" Label="Text field" Variant="Variant.Text" Required="true"/>

</MudForm>

@if (_isFormValid)
{
    <MudText>Valid</MudText>
}
else
{
    <MudText>NOT Valid</MudText>
}

@code {
    private string _color;
    private string _car;
    private bool _isFormValid;
    private string _text;
}
```

Color selector:
```cs
@using System.Linq.Expressions

<MudSelect T="string" @bind-Value="_color" Label="Color" Required="true">
    <MudSelectItem T="string" Value="@("Red")"></MudSelectItem>
    <MudSelectItem T="string" Value="@("Green")"></MudSelectItem>
    <MudSelectItem T="string" Value="@("Blue")"></MudSelectItem>
</MudSelect>

@code {
    [Parameter]
    public string? Color { get;set; }

    [Parameter]
    public EventCallback<string?> ColorChanged { get; set; }

    [Parameter]
    public Expression<string?> TestExpression { get; set; }

    private string? _color;
}
```

**Expected result:**
When tabbing out of the unselected/empty MudSelect I want to show a red border and error message the same as it is done for the text field.

### Reproduction link

https://try.mudblazor.com/snippet/QYwpPPwgBPfgLWSf

### Reproduction steps

1. Open page
2. Use TAB or mouse clicks to go through elements of the form.
3. Notice that only the text fields show red error when left without the text.
3. Notice that validation does fire as the form validation status show correct value.
4. Notice that red outline and error text is missing for MudSelect elements


### Version (bug)

v8.14.0

### Version (working)

_No response_

### Environment

Edge, Firefox

### Blazor rendering mode

WASM

    47	        public MudSelect()
    48	        {
    49	            _context = new MudSelectContext<T>(this);
    50	            Adornment = Adornment.End;
    51	            IconSize = Size.Medium;
    52	            using var registerScope = CreateRegisterScope();
    53	            registerScope.RegisterParameter<bool>(nameof(MultiSelection))
    54	                .WithParameter(() => MultiSelection)
    55	                .WithChangeHandler(() => UpdateTextPropertyAsync(false));
    56	            registerScope.RegisterParameter<IEqualityComparer<T?>?>(nameof(Comparer))
    57	                .WithParameter(() => Comparer)
    58	                .WithChangeHandler(OnComparerChangedAsync);
    59	            _openState = registerScope.RegisterParameter<bool>(nameof(Open))
    60	                .WithParameter(() => Open)
    61	                .WithEventCallback(() => OpenChanged);
    62	            _selectedValuesState = registerScope.RegisterParameter<IReadOnlyCollection<T?>?>(nameof(SelectedValues))
    63	                .WithParameter(() => SelectedValues)
    64	                .WithEventCallback(() => SelectedValuesChanged)
    65	                .WithChangeHandler(OnSelectedValuesChangedAsync)
    66	                .WithComparer(() => new SequenceComparer<T?>(Comparer));
    67	            registerScope.RegisterParameter<bool>(nameof(FitContent))
    68	                .WithParameter(() => FitContent)
    69	                .WithChangeHandler(OnFitContentChanged);
    70	        }
    71	
    72	        protected string OuterClassname =>
    73	            new CssBuilder("mud-select")
    74	                .AddClass("mud-width-full", FullWidth)
    75	                .AddClass("mud-width-content", FitContent && !FullWidth)
    76	                .AddClass(OuterClass)
    77	                .Build();

   466	        /// If an <c>AdornmentIcon</c> is set, it is returned.  Otherwise, either <see cref="OpenIcon"/> or <see cref="CloseIcon"/> is returned depending on whether the drop-down is open.
   467	        /// </remarks>
   468	        internal string? _currentIcon { get; set; }
   469	
   470	        /// <summary>
   471	        /// Whether the <c>Value</c> can be found in the list of <see cref="Items"/>.
   472	        /// </summary>
   473	        /// <remarks>
   474	        /// When <c>false</c>, the <c>Value</c> will be displayed as a string.
   475	        /// </remarks>
   476	        protected bool CanRenderValue
   477	        {
   478	            get
   479	            {
   480	                if (MultiSelection)
   481	                {
   482	                    return false;
   483	                }
   484	
   485	                if (ToStringFunc is not null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(ToStringFunc(ReadValue)))
   486	                {
   487	                    return false;
   488	                }
   489	
   490	                if (!_context.TryGetShadowItemByValue(ReadValue, out var item))
   491	                {
   492	                    return false;
   493	                }
   494	
   495	                return item.ChildContent != null;
   496	            }
   497	        }
   498	
   499	        protected bool IsValueInList => _context.TryGetShadowItemByValue(ReadValue, out _);
   500	
   501	        /// <summary>
   502	        /// Builds fallback accessibility attributes for the focused select trigger.
   503	        /// </summary>
   504	        /// <remarks>
   505	        /// <see cref="MudSelect{T}"/> keeps focus on its trigger while the popup is open, so the trigger publishes the combobox relationship to the popup list.
   506	        /// </remarks>
   507	        private Dictionary<string, object?> GetInputUserAttributes()
   508	        {
   509	            var attributes = new Dictionary<string, object?>(UserAttributes, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
   510	            attributes.TryAdd("role", "combobox");
   511	            attributes.TryAdd("aria-autocomplete", "none");
   512	            attributes.TryAdd("aria-controls", _listboxId);
   513	            attributes.TryAdd("aria-expanded", _openState.Value ? "true" : "false");
   514	            attributes.TryAdd("aria-haspopup", "listbox");
   515	
   516	            if (!attributes.ContainsKey("aria-label") && !attributes.ContainsKey("aria-labelledby") && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Label))
   517	            {
   518	                attributes["aria-label"] = Label;
   519	            }
   520	
   521	            if (_openState.Value && _activeItemId is not null)
   522	            {
   523	                attributes.TryAdd("aria-activedescendant", _activeItemId);
   524	            }
   525	
   526	            return attributes;
   527	        }
   528	
   529	        /// <summary>
   530	        /// Builds the attributes applied to the internal popup list.
   531	        /// </summary>
   532	        /// <remarks>
   533	        /// Provides the stable list identifier and list-level semantics owned by <see cref="MudSelect{T}"/>.
   534	        /// </remarks>
   535	        private Dictionary<string, object?> GetListUserAttributes()
   536	        {
   537	            var attributes = new Dictionary<string, object?>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
   538	            {
   539	                ["id"] = _listboxId
   540	            };
   541	
   542	            if (MultiSelection)
   543	            {
   544	                attributes["aria-multiselectable"] = "true";
   545	            }
   546	
   547	            return attributes;
   548	        }
   549	
   550	        /// <summary>
   551	        /// The icon to display whether all, none, or some items are selected.
   552	        /// </summary>
   553	        /// <remarks>
   554	        /// Only applies when <see cref="MultiSelection"/> is <c>true</c>.
   555	        /// If all items are selected, <see cref="CheckedIcon"/> is returned.
   556	        /// If no items are selected, <see cref="UncheckedIcon"/> is returned.
   557	        /// Otherwise, <see cref="IndeterminateIcon"/> is returned.
   558	        /// </remarks>
   559	        protected string SelectAllCheckBoxIcon
   560	        {
   561	            get
   562	            {
   563	                if (!_selectAllChecked.HasValue)
   564	                {
   565	                    return IndeterminateIcon;
   566	                }
   567	
   568	                return _selectAllChecked.Value ? CheckedIcon : UncheckedIcon;
   569	            }
   570	        }
   571	
   572	        /// <summary>
   573	        /// Selects the item at the specified index.
   574	        /// </summary>
   575	        /// <param name="index">The ordinal of the item to select (starting at <c>0</c>).  When <see cref="MultiSelection"/> is <c>true</c>, the item will be added to the selected items.</param>
   576	        public async Task SelectOption(int index)
   577	        {
   578	            if (index < 0 || index >= Items.Count)
   579	            {
   580	                if (!MultiSelection)
   581	                {
   582	                    await CloseMenu();
   583	                }
   584	
   585	                return;
   586	            }
   587	
   588	            await SelectOption(Items[index].Value);
   589	        }
   590	
   591	        /// <summary>
   592	        /// Selects the item with the specified value.
   593	        /// </summary>
   594	        /// <param name="value">The value to select.  When <see cref="MultiSelection"/> is <c>true</c>, the selection is cleared if it was already selected.</param>
   595	        public async Task SelectOption(T? value)
   596	        {
   597	            var comparer = Comparer ?? EqualityComparer<T?>.Default;
   598	
   599	            if (MultiSelection)
   600	            {
   601	                // Toggle selection
   602	                if (!_selectedValues.Add(value))
   603	                {
   604	                    _selectedValues.Remove(value);
   605	                }
   606	
   607	                var converted = _selectedValues.Select(ConvertSet).ToList();
   608	                var text = string.Join(Delimiter, converted);
   609	
   610	                if (MultiSelectionTextFunc is not null)
   611	                {
   612	                    await SetCustomizedTextAsync(
   613	                        text,
   614	                        selectedConvertedValues: converted,
   615	                        multiSelectionTextFunc: MultiSelectionTextFunc
   616	                    );
   617	                }
   618	                else
   619	                {
   620	                    await SetTextAndUpdateValueAsync(text, updateValue: false);
   621	                }
   622	
   623	                UpdateSelectAllChecked();
   624	                await BeginValidateAsync();
   625	            }
   626	            else
   627	            {
   628	                // Highlight before closing
   629	                await HighlightItemForValueAsync(value);
   630	
   631	                await CloseMenu(false);
   632	
   633	                // Early exit if unchanged
   634	                if (comparer.Equals(ReadValue, value))
   635	                {
   636	                    await UpdateSelectedValuesStateAsync(comparer);
   637	                    return;
   638	                }
   639	
   640	                // Replace selection
   641	                _selectedValues.Clear();
   642	                _selectedValues.Add(value);
   643	
   644	                await SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync(value);
   645	                _elementReference.SetText(ReadText).CatchAndLog();
   646	            }
   647	
   648	            if (MultiSelection)
   649	            {
   650	                await HighlightItemForValueAsync(value);
   651	            }
   652	
   653	            await UpdateSelectedValuesStateAsync(comparer);
   654	
   655	            FieldChanged(_selectedValues);
   656	
   657	            if (MultiSelection && typeof(T) == typeof(string))
   658	            {
   659	                await SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync((T?)(object?)ReadText, updateText: false);
   660	            }
   661	
   662	            await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
   663	        }
   664	
   665	        /// <summary>
   666	        /// Opens or closes the drop-down menu.
   667	        /// </summary>
   668	        /// <remarks>
   669	        /// Has no effect if <c>Disabled</c> or <c>ReadOnly</c> is <c>true</c>.
   670	        /// </remarks>
   671	        public async Task ToggleMenu()
   672	        {
   673	            if (GetDisabledState() || GetReadOnlyState())
   674	            {
   675	                return;
   676	            }
   677	
   678	            if (_openState.Value)
   679	            {
   680	                await CloseMenu(true);
   681	            }
   682	            else
   683	            {
   684	                await OpenMenu();
   685	            }
   686	        }
   687	
   688	        /// <summary>
   689	        /// Opens the drop-down menu.
   690	        /// </summary>
   691	        /// <remarks>
   692	        /// Has no effect if <c>Disabled</c> or <c>ReadOnly</c> is <c>true</c>.
   693	        /// </remarks>
   694	        public async Task OpenMenu()
   695	        {
   696	            if (GetDisabledState() || GetReadOnlyState())
   697	            {
   698	                return;
   699	            }
   700	
   701	            await _openState.SetValueAsync(true);
   702	            _needsHighlightAfterRender = true;
   703	            UpdateIcon();
   704	            StateHasChanged();
   705	
   706	            //Scroll the active item on each opening
   707	            if (_activeItemId != null)
   708	            {
   709	                var index = Items.FindIndex(x => x.ItemId == _activeItemId);
   710	                if (index > 0)
   711	                {
   712	                    var item = Items[index];
   713	                    await ScrollToItemAsync(item);
   714	                }
   715	            }
   716	
   717	            //disable escape propagation: if selectmenu is open, only the select popover should close and underlying components should not handle escape key
   718	            await KeyInterceptorService.UpdateKeyAsync(ElementId, new("Escape", stopDown: "key+none"));
   719	        }
   720	
   721	        /// <summary>
   722	        /// Closes the drop-down menu.
   723	        /// </summary>
   724	        /// <remarks>
   725	        /// Has no effect if <c>Disabled</c> or <c>ReadOnly</c> is <c>true</c>.
   726	        /// </remarks>
   727	        public async Task CloseMenu(bool focusAgain = true)
   728	        {
   729	            await _openState.SetValueAsync(false);
   730	            UpdateIcon();
   731	            if (focusAgain)
   732	            {
   733	                StateHasChanged();
   734	                await OnBlur.InvokeAsync(new FocusEventArgs());
   735	                _elementReference.FocusAsync().CatchAndLog(ignoreExceptions: true);
   736	                StateHasChanged();
   737	            }
   738	
   739	            //enable escape propagation: the select popover was closed, now underlying components are allowed to handle escape key
   740	            await KeyInterceptorService.UpdateKeyAsync(ElementId, new("Escape", stopDown: "none"));
   741	        }
   742	
   743	        /// <summary>
   744	        /// Clears all selections.
   745	        /// </summary>
   746	        /// <remarks>
   747	        /// To reset validation errors (e.g. required), use <see cref="ResetValueAsync"/>
   748	        /// </remarks>
   749	        public async Task ClearAsync()
   750	        {
   751	            await SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync(default, false);
   752	            await SetTextAndUpdateValueAsync(null, false);
   753	            _selectedValues.Clear();
   754	            await BeginValidateAsync();
   755	            StateHasChanged();
   756	            await UpdateSelectedValuesStateAsync();
   757	            FieldChanged(_selectedValues);
   758	        }
   759	
   760	        /// <summary>
   761	        /// Sets the focus to this component.
   762	        /// </summary>
   763	        public override ValueTask FocusAsync()
   764	        {
   765	            return _elementReference.FocusAsync();
   766	        }
   767	
   768	        /// <summary>
   769	        /// Releases the focus from this component.
   770	        /// </summary>
   771	        public override ValueTask BlurAsync()
   772	        {
   773	            return _elementReference.BlurAsync();
   774	        }
   775	
   776	        /// <summary>
   777	        /// Selects the text within this component.
   778	        /// </summary>
   779	        public override ValueTask SelectAsync()
   780	        {
   781	            return _elementReference.SelectAsync();
   782	        }
   783	
   784	        /// <summary>
   785	        /// Selects a portion of text within this component.
   786	        /// </summary>
   787	        /// <param name="pos1">The index of the first character to select.  (Starting at <c>0</c>.)</param>
   788	        /// <param name="pos2">The index of the last character to select.</param>
   789	        public override ValueTask SelectRangeAsync(int pos1, int pos2)
   790	        {
   791	            return _elementReference.SelectRangeAsync(pos1, pos2);
   792	        }
   793	
   794	        private async Task OnComparerChangedAsync(ParameterChangedEventArgs<IEqualityComparer<T?>?> arg)
   795	        {
   796	            // Apply comparer and refresh selected values
   797	            _selectedValues = new HashSet<T?>(_selectedValues, arg.Value);
   798	            await UpdateSelectedValuesStateAsync(arg.Value);
   799	        }
   800	
   801	        private async Task OnSelectedValuesChangedAsync(ParameterChangedEventArgs<IReadOnlyCollection<T?>?> arg)
   802	        {
   803	            var value = arg.Value;
   804	
   805	            // Update internal HashSet with new values - make a defensive copy to avoid shared references
   806	            // The HashSet uses the Comparer for equality checks and ensures uniqueness
   807	            _selectedValues = value != null ? new HashSet<T?>(value, Comparer) : new HashSet<T?>(Comparer);
   808	
   809	            // Notify all subscribed items of the selection change
   810	            await _context.NotifySelectionChangedAsync();
   811	
   812	            if (!MultiSelection)
   813	            {
   814	                await SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync(_selectedValues.FirstOrDefault());
   815	            }
   816	            else
   817	            {
   818	                //Warning. Here the Converter was not set yet
   819	                if (MultiSelectionTextFunc != null)
   820	                {
   821	                    await SetCustomizedTextAsync(string.Join(Delimiter, _selectedValues.Select(ConvertSet)),
   822	                        selectedConvertedValues: _selectedValues.Select(ConvertSet).ToList(),
   823	                        multiSelectionTextFunc: MultiSelectionTextFunc);
   824	                }
   825	                else
   826	                {
   827	                    await SetTextAndUpdateValueAsync(string.Join(Delimiter, _selectedValues.Select(ConvertSet)), updateValue: false);
   828	                }
   829	            }
   830	
   831	            // Only fire FieldChanged after the first render to avoid triggering during initialization
   832	            if (HasRendered)
   833	            {
   834	                FieldChanged(_selectedValues);
   835	            }
   836	
   837	            if (MultiSelection && typeof(T) == typeof(string))
   838	            {
   839	                await SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync((T?)(object?)ReadText, updateText: false);
   840	            }
   841	        }
   842	
   843	        internal void UpdateFitContent()
   844	        {
   845	            if (FitContent)
   846	            {
   847	                var longestItemLength = 0;
   848	                var longestItem = default(MudSelectItem<T>);
   849	                foreach (var item in _context.ShadowItems)
   850	                {
   851	                    var value = item.Value;
   852	                    var valueToString = ConvertSet(value);
   853	                    var length = valueToString?.Length ?? 0;
   854	
   855	                    if (length > longestItemLength)
   856	                    {
   857	                        longestItem = item;
   858	                        longestItemLength = length;
   859	                    }
   860	                }
   861	
   862	                if (ReferenceEquals(_longestItem, longestItem))
   863	                {
   864	                    return;
   865	                }
   866	
   867	                _longestItem = longestItem;
   868	                StateHasChanged();
   869	                return;
   870	            }
   871	
   872	            _longestItem = null;
   873	        }
   874	
   875	        internal void InvalidateFitContent()
   876	        {
   877	            if (FitContent)
   878	            {
   879	                _needsFitContentRefresh = true;
   880	            }
   881	        }
   882	
   883	        private void OnFitContentChanged(ParameterChangedEventArgs<bool> args)
   884	        {
   885	            if (args.Value)
   886	            {
   887	                UpdateFitContent();
   888	                return;
   889	            }
   890	
   891	            _needsFitContentRefresh = false;
   892	            _longestItem = null;
   893	        }
   894	
   895	        private void UpdateIcon()
   896	        {
   897	            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(AdornmentIcon))
   898	            {
   899	                _currentIcon = AdornmentIcon;
   900	                return;
   901	            }
   902	
   903	            _currentIcon = _openState.Value ? CloseIcon : OpenIcon;
   904	        }
   905	
   906	        private Task HighlightItemForValueAsync(T? value)
   907	        {
   908	            _context.TryGetItemByValue(value, out var item);
   909	            return HighlightItemAsync(item);
   910	        }
   911	
   912	        private Task HighlightItemAsync(MudSelectItem<T>? item)
   913	        {
   914	            _activeItemId = item?.ItemId;
   915	            return InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
   916	        }
   917	
   918	        private void UpdateSelectAllChecked()
   919	        {
   920	            if (MultiSelection && SelectAll)
   921	            {
   922	                if (_selectedValues.Count == 0)
   923	                {
   924	                    _selectAllChecked = false;
   925	                }
   926	                else if (Items.Count(x => !x.Disabled) == _selectedValues.Count)
   927	                {
   928	                    _selectAllChecked = true;
   929	                }
   930	                else
   931	                {
   932	                    _selectAllChecked = null;
   933	                }
   934	            }
   935	        }
   936	
   937	        private async Task SelectAllClickAsync()
   938	        {
   939	            // Manage the fake tri-state of a checkbox
   940	            if (!_selectAllChecked.HasValue)
   941	            {
   942	                _selectAllChecked = true;
   943	            }
   944	            else if (_selectAllChecked.Value)
   945	            {
   946	                _selectAllChecked = false;
   947	            }
   948	            else
   949	            {
   950	                _selectAllChecked = true;
   951	            }
   952	
   953	            // Define the items selection
   954	            if (_selectAllChecked.Value)
   955	            {
   956	                await SelectAllItems();
   957	            }
   958	            else
   959	            {
   960	                await ClearAsync();
   961	            }
   962	        }
   963	
   964	        private async Task SelectAllItems()
   965	        {
   966	            if (!MultiSelection)
   967	            {
   968	                return;
   969	            }
   970	
   971	            var selectedValues = new HashSet<T?>(Items.Where(x => !x.Disabled && x.Value != null).Select(x => x.Value), Comparer);
   972	            _selectedValues = new HashSet<T?>(selectedValues, Comparer);
   973	
   974	            if (MultiSelectionTextFunc != null)
   975	            {
   976	                await SetCustomizedTextAsync(string.Join(Delimiter, _selectedValues.Select(ConvertSet)),
   977	                    selectedConvertedValues: _selectedValues.Select(ConvertSet).ToList(),
   978	                    multiSelectionTextFunc: MultiSelectionTextFunc);
   979	            }
   980	            else
   981	            {
   982	                await SetTextAndUpdateValueAsync(string.Join(Delimiter, _selectedValues.Select(ConvertSet)), updateValue: false);
   983	            }
   984	
   985	            UpdateSelectAllChecked();
   986	            _selectedValues = selectedValues; // need to force selected values because Blazor overwrites it under certain circumstances due to changes of Text or Value
   987	            await BeginValidateAsync();
   988	            await UpdateSelectedValuesStateAsync();
   989	            FieldChanged(_selectedValues);
   990	
   991	            if (MultiSelection && typeof(T) == typeof(string))
   992	            {
   993	                SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync((T?)(object?)ReadText, updateText: false).CatchAndLog();
   994	            }
   995	        }
   996	
   997	        private async Task OnFocusOutAsync()
   998	        {
   999	            if (_openState.Value)
  1000	            {
  1001	                // when the menu is open we immediately get back the focus if we lose it (i.e. because of checkboxes in multi-select)
  1002	                // otherwise we can't receive key strokes any longer
  1003	                await FocusAsync();
  1004	            }
  1005	        }
  1006	
  1007	        private Task SelectNextItem() => SelectAdjacentItem(+1);
  1008	
  1009	        private Task SelectPreviousItem() => SelectAdjacentItem(-1);
  1010	
  1011	        private async Task SelectAdjacentItem(int direction)
  1012	        {
  1013	            if (Items.Count == 0)
  1014	            {
  1015	                return;
  1016	            }
  1017	
  1018	            var index = Items.FindIndex(x => x.ItemId == _activeItemId);
  1019	            if (direction < 0 && index < 0)
  1020	            {
  1021	                index = 0;
  1022	            }
  1023	
  1024	            MudSelectItem<T>? item = null;
  1025	            // the loop allows us to jump over disabled items until we reach the next non-disabled one
  1026	            for (var i = 0; i < Items.Count; i++)
  1027	            {
  1028	                index += direction;
  1029	                if (index < 0)
  1030	                {
  1031	                    index = 0;
  1032	                }
  1033	
  1034	                if (index >= Items.Count)
  1035	                {
  1036	                    index = Items.Count - 1;
  1037	                }
  1038	
  1039	                if (Items[index].Disabled)
  1040	                {
  1041	                    continue;
  1042	                }
  1043	
  1044	                item = Items[index];
  1045	                if (!MultiSelection)
  1046	                {
  1047	                    // When SelectionOnEnter is true, we only update the visual highlight during navigation.
  1048	                    // When false (default), the value is immediately updated as the user moves through the list.
  1049	                    if (!SelectionOnEnter)
  1050	                    {
  1051	                        _selectedValues.Clear();
  1052	                        _selectedValues.Add(item.Value);
  1053	                        await SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync(item.Value, updateText: true);
  1054	                    }
  1055	
  1056	                    await HighlightItemAsync(item);
  1057	                    break;
  1058	                }
  1059	
  1060	                // in multiselect mode don't select anything, just highlight.
  1061	                // selecting is done by Enter
  1062	                await HighlightItemAsync(item);
  1063	                break;
  1064	            }
  1065	
  1066	            await _elementReference.SetText(ReadText);
  1067	            await ScrollToItemAsync(item);
  1068	        }
  1069	
  1070	        private ValueTask ScrollToItemAsync(MudSelectItem<T>? item)
  1071	            => item != null ? ScrollManager.ScrollToListItemAsync(item.ItemId) : ValueTask.CompletedTask;
  1072	
  1073	        private async Task SelectFirstItem(string? startChar = null)
  1074	        {
  1075	            IReadOnlyCollection<MudSelectItem<T>> selectList = Items;
  1076	
  1077	            if (!_openState.Value)
  1078	            {
  1079	                // When closed, use shadow lookup to include all items (visible + hidden)
  1080	                selectList = _context.ShadowItems;
  1081	            }
  1082	
  1083	            if (selectList.Count == 0)
  1084	            {
  1085	                return;
  1086	            }
  1087	
  1088	            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(startChar))
  1089	            {
  1090	                // SelectItemBySearch handles disabled items
  1091	                var searchItem = SelectItemBySearch(selectList, startChar);
  1092	                if (searchItem is not null)
  1093	                {
  1094	                    await SelectAndHighlightItemAsync(searchItem);
  1095	                    return;
  1096	                }
  1097	            }
  1098	
  1099	            // Find first non-disabled item
  1100	            foreach (var item in selectList)
  1101	            {
  1102	                if (item.Disabled)
  1103	                {
  1104	                    continue;
  1105	                }
  1106	
  1107	                await SelectAndHighlightItemAsync(item);
  1108	                return;
  1109	            }
  1110	        }
  1111	
  1112	        private MudSelectItem<T>? SelectItemBySearch(IReadOnlyCollection<MudSelectItem<T>> items, string inputChar)
  1113	        {
  1114	            UpdateSearchText(inputChar);
  1115	
  1116	            MudSelectItem<T>? activeItem = null;
  1117	            MudSelectItem<T>? previousItem = null;
  1118	            MudSelectItem<T>? firstMatch = null;
  1119	            MudSelectItem<T>? nextMatch = null;
  1120	            var foundPrevious = false;
  1121	
  1122	            foreach (var item in items)
  1123	            {
  1124	                TrackSpecialItems(item, ref activeItem, ref previousItem);
  1125	
  1126	                if (IsMatch(item))
  1127	                {
  1128	                    firstMatch ??= item;
  1129	
  1130	                    if (foundPrevious)
  1131	                    {
  1132	                        nextMatch ??= item;
  1133	                    }
  1134	
  1135	                    if (item == previousItem)
  1136	                    {
  1137	                        foundPrevious = true;
  1138	                    }
  1139	                }
  1140	            }
  1141	
  1142	            return DetermineResult(activeItem, previousItem, firstMatch, nextMatch);
  1143	
  1144	            void UpdateSearchText(string input)
  1145	            {
  1146	                var now = TimeProvider.GetUtcNow();
  1147	
  1148	                if (now - _lastSearchTime > QuickSearchInterval)
  1149	                {
  1150	                    _lastSelectedId = _activeItemId;
  1151	                    _searchText = input;
  1152	                }
  1153	                else
  1154	                {
  1155	                    _searchText += input;
  1156	                }
  1157	
  1158	                _lastSearchTime = now;
  1159	            }
  1160	
  1161	            void TrackSpecialItems(MudSelectItem<T> item, ref MudSelectItem<T>? active, ref MudSelectItem<T>? previous)
  1162	            {
  1163	                if (item.ItemId == _activeItemId)
  1164	                {
  1165	                    active = item;
  1166	                }
  1167	
  1168	                if (item.ItemId == _lastSelectedId)
  1169	                {
  1170	                    previous = item;
  1171	                }
  1172	            }
  1173	
  1174	            bool IsMatch(MudSelectItem<T> item)
  1175	            {
  1176	                if (item.Disabled)
  1177	                {
  1178	                    return false;
  1179	                }
  1180	
  1181	                var text = ConvertSet(item.Value);
  1182	                return text is not null && text.StartsWith(_searchText, StringComparison.InvariantCultureIgnoreCase);
  1183	            }
  1184	
  1185	            MudSelectItem<T>? DetermineResult(MudSelectItem<T>? active, MudSelectItem<T>? previous,
  1186	                                               MudSelectItem<T>? first, MudSelectItem<T>? next)
  1187	            {
  1188	                if (first is null)
  1189	                {
  1190	                    return active;
  1191	                }
  1192	
  1193	                if (previous is null)
  1194	                {
  1195	                    return first;
  1196	                }
  1197	
  1198	                return next ?? first;
  1199	            }
  1200	        }
  1201	
  1202	        private async Task SelectAndHighlightItemAsync(MudSelectItem<T> item)
  1203	        {
  1204	            if (!MultiSelection)
  1205	            {
  1206	                _selectedValues.Clear();
  1207	                _selectedValues.Add(item.Value);
  1208	                await SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync(item.Value, updateText: true);
  1209	                await UpdateSelectedValuesStateAsync();
  1210	            }
  1211	
  1212	            await HighlightItemAsync(item);
  1213	            await _elementReference.SetText(ReadText);
  1214	            await ScrollToItemAsync(item);
  1215	        }
  1216	
  1217	        private async Task SelectLastItem()
  1218	        {
  1219	            if (Items.Count == 0)
  1220	            {
  1221	                return;
  1222	            }
  1223	
  1224	            var item = Items.LastOrDefault(x => !x.Disabled);
  1225	            if (item == null)
  1226	            {
  1227	                return;
  1228	            }
  1229	
  1230	            if (!MultiSelection)
  1231	            {
  1232	                _selectedValues.Clear();
  1233	                _selectedValues.Add(item.Value);
  1234	                await SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync(item.Value, updateText: true);
  1235	            }
  1236	
  1237	            await HighlightItemAsync(item);
  1238	            await _elementReference.SetText(ReadText);
  1239	            await ScrollToItemAsync(item);
  1240	        }
  1241	
  1242	        internal Task HandleMouseDown(MouseEventArgs args)
  1243	        {
  1244	            if (args.Button != 0) // if it wasn't left click drop out
  1245	            {
  1246	                return Task.CompletedTask;
  1247	            }
  1248	
  1249	            return ToggleMenu();
  1250	        }
  1251	
  1252	        /// <summary>
  1253	        /// Internal method for MudSelectItem to access the converted string value.
  1254	        /// </summary>
  1255	        internal string? ConvertValueToString(T? value) => ConvertSet(value);
  1256	
  1257	        /// <summary>
  1258	        /// Internal method for the context to access the current selected values.
  1259	        /// </summary>
  1260	        internal IReadOnlyCollection<T?>? GetSelectedValues() => _selectedValuesState.Value;
  1261	
  1262	        private bool CanHandleKeys() => !GetDisabledState() && !GetReadOnlyState();
  1263	
  1264	        private async Task HandleArrowUpAsync(KeyboardEventArgs args)
  1265	        {
  1266	            if (args.AltKey)
  1267	            {
  1268	                await CloseMenu();
  1269	                return;
  1270	            }
  1271	
  1272	            if (!_openState.Value)
  1273	            {
  1274	                await OpenMenu();
  1275	                return;
  1276	            }
  1277	
  1278	            await SelectPreviousItem();
  1279	        }
  1280	
  1281	        private async Task HandleArrowDownAsync(KeyboardEventArgs args)
  1282	        {
  1283	            if (args.AltKey)
  1284	            {
  1285	                await OpenMenu();
  1286	                return;
  1287	            }
  1288	
  1289	            if (!_openState.Value)
  1290	            {
  1291	                await OpenMenu();
  1292	                return;
  1293	            }
  1294	
  1295	            await SelectNextItem();
  1296	        }
  1297	
  1298	        private async Task HandleEnterAsync()
  1299	        {
  1300	            var index = Items.FindIndex(x => x.ItemId == _activeItemId);
  1301	            if (!MultiSelection)
  1302	            {
  1303	                if (!_openState.Value)
  1304	                {
  1305	                    await OpenMenu();
  1306	                    return;
  1307	                }
  1308	
  1309	                // this also closes the menu
  1310	                await SelectOption(index);
  1311	                return;
  1312	            }
  1313	
  1314	            if (!_openState.Value)
  1315	            {
  1316	                await OpenMenu();
  1317	                return;
  1318	            }
  1319	
  1320	            await SelectOption(index);
  1321	            await _elementReference.SetText(ReadText);
  1322	        }
  1323	
  1324	        private async Task HandleKeyAAsync(KeyboardEventArgs args)
  1325	        {
  1326	            if (args.CtrlKey)
  1327	            {
  1328	                if (MultiSelection)
  1329	                {
  1330	                    await SelectAllClickAsync();
  1331	                    StateHasChanged();
  1332	                }
  1333	            }
  1334	            else if (!args.ShiftKey && !args.AltKey && !args.MetaKey)
  1335	            {
  1336	                await SelectFirstItem(args.Key.ToLowerInvariant());
  1337	                await FocusAsync();
  1338	            }
  1339	        }
  1340	
  1341	        private async Task HandleCharacterSearchAsync(KeyboardEventArgs args)
  1342	        {
  1343	            if (args.CtrlKey || args.ShiftKey || args.AltKey || args.MetaKey)
  1344	            {
  1345	                return;
  1346	            }
  1347	
  1348	            var key = args.Key;
  1349	            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(key))
  1350	            {
  1351	                return;
  1352	            }
  1353	
  1354	            key = key.ToLowerInvariant();
  1355	            if (key.Length != 1)
  1356	            {
  1357	                return;
  1358	            }
  1359	
  1360	            await SelectFirstItem(key);
  1361	            await FocusAsync();
  1362	        }
  1363	
  1364	        internal Task OnBlurAsync(FocusEventArgs obj)
  1365	        {
  1366	            return base.OnBlur.InvokeAsync(obj);
  1367	        }
  1368	
  1369	        protected override void OnInitialized()
  1370	        {
  1371	            base.OnInitialized();
  1372	            UpdateIcon();
  1373	        }
  1374	
  1375	        protected override void OnParametersSet()
  1376	        {
  1377	            base.OnParametersSet();
  1378	            UpdateIcon();
  1379	        }
  1380	
  1381	        protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
  1382	        {
  1383	            if (firstRender)
  1384	            {
  1385	                var options = new KeyInterceptorOptions(
  1386	                    "mud-input-control",
  1387	                    [
  1388	                        // prevent scrolling page, toggle open/close
  1389	                        new(" ", preventDown: "key+none"),
  1390	                        // prevent scrolling page, instead highlight previous item
  1391	                        new("ArrowUp", preventDown: "key+none"),
  1392	                        // prevent scrolling page, instead highlight next item
  1393	                        new("ArrowDown", preventDown: "key+none"),
  1394	                        new("Home", preventDown: "key+none"),
  1395	                        new("End", preventDown: "key+none"),
  1396	                        new("Escape"),
  1397	                        new("Enter", preventDown: "key+none"),
  1398	                        new("NumpadEnter", preventDown: "key+none"),
  1399	                        // select all items instead of all page text
  1400	                        new("a", preventDown: "key+ctrl"),
  1401	                        // select all items instead of all page text
  1402	                        new("A", preventDown: "key+ctrl"),
  1403	                        // for our users
  1404	                        new("/./", subscribeDown: true, subscribeUp: true)
  1405	                    ]);
  1406	
  1407	                await KeyInterceptorService.SubscribeAsync(ElementId, options, keys => keys
  1408	                    .HookKeyUp(args => OnKeyUp.InvokeAsync(args))
  1409	                    .When(CanHandleKeys, builder => builder
  1410	                        .HookKeyDown(args => OnKeyDown.InvokeAsync(args))
  1411	                        .OnKeyDown("Tab", () => CloseMenu(false))
  1412	                        .OnKeyDown("ArrowUp", HandleArrowUpAsync)
  1413	                        .OnKeyDown("ArrowDown", HandleArrowDownAsync)
  1414	                        .OnKeyDown(" ", ToggleMenu)
  1415	                        .OnKeyDown("Escape", () => CloseMenu(true))
  1416	                        .OnKeyDown("Home", () => SelectFirstItem())
  1417	                        .OnKeyDown("End", SelectLastItem)
  1418	                        .OnKeyDownAny(["Enter", "NumpadEnter"], HandleEnterAsync)
  1419	                        .OnKeyDownAny(["a", "A"], HandleKeyAAsync)
  1420	                        .OnKeyDown("/^[^ ]$/", HandleCharacterSearchAsync)));
  1421	            }
  1422	
  1423	            await base.OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender);
  1424	
  1425	            var needsFitContentRefresh = _needsFitContentRefresh;
  1426	            _needsFitContentRefresh = false;
  1427	
  1428	            if (needsFitContentRefresh)
  1429	            {
  1430	                UpdateFitContent();
  1431	            }
  1432	            else if (firstRender)
  1433	            {
  1434	                // we need to render the initial Value which is not possible without the items
  1435	                // which supply the RenderFragment. So in this case, a second render is necessary
  1436	                StateHasChanged();
  1437	            }
  1438	
  1439	            UpdateSelectAllChecked();
  1440	
  1441	            // Highlight after items are fully rendered
  1442	            if (_needsHighlightAfterRender)
  1443	            {
  1444	                _needsHighlightAfterRender = false;
  1445	                await InvokeAsync(async () =>
  1446	                {
  1447	                    if (MultiSelection)
  1448	                    {
  1449	                        var firstNonDisabled = Items.FirstOrDefault(x => !x.Disabled);
  1450	                        await HighlightItemAsync(firstNonDisabled);
  1451	                    }
  1452	                    else
  1453	                    {
  1454	                        await HighlightItemForValueAsync(ReadValue);
  1455	                    }
  1456	                });
  1457	            }
  1458	        }
  1459	
  1460	        /// <summary>
  1461	        /// Gets the resolved modal overlay value, using the global default from <see cref="PopoverOptions"/> if not explicitly set.
  1462	        /// </summary>
  1463	        protected bool GetModal() => Modal ?? PopoverService.PopoverOptions.ModalOverlay;
  1464	
  1465	        protected RenderFragment? GetSelectedValuePresenter()
  1466	        {
  1467	            if (!_context.TryGetShadowItemByValue(ReadValue, out var item))
  1468	            {
  1469	                return null; //<-- for now. we'll add a custom template to present values (set from outside) which are not on the list?
  1470	            }
  1471	
  1472	            return item.ChildContent;
  1473	        }
  1474	
  1475	        /// <summary>
  1476	        /// Occurs when the <c>Clear</c> button has been clicked.
  1477	        /// </summary>
  1478	        /// <remarks>
  1479	        /// This is the first event raised when the clear button is clicked.
  1480	        /// The <see cref="SelectedValues"/> are cleared and the <see cref="OnClearButtonClick"/> event is raised.
  1481	        /// </remarks>
  1482	        protected async ValueTask SelectClearButtonClickHandlerAsync(MouseEventArgs e)
  1483	        {
  1484	            await SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync(default, false);
  1485	            await SetTextAndUpdateValueAsync(null, false);
  1486	            _selectedValues.Clear();
  1487	            await BeginValidateAsync();
  1488	            StateHasChanged();
  1489	            await UpdateSelectedValuesStateAsync();
  1490	            FieldChanged(_selectedValues);
  1491	            await OnClearButtonClick.InvokeAsync(e);
  1492	        }
  1493	
  1494	        private async Task UpdateSelectedValuesStateAsync(IEqualityComparer<T?>? comparer = null)
  1495	        {
  1496	            await _selectedValuesState.SetValueAsync(new HashSet<T?>(_selectedValues, comparer ?? Comparer));
  1497	            await _context.NotifySelectionChangedAsync();
  1498	        }
  1499	
  1500	        protected async Task SetCustomizedTextAsync(string text, bool updateValue = true,
  1501	            IReadOnlyList<string?>? selectedConvertedValues = null,
  1502	            Func<IReadOnlyList<string?>?, string>? multiSelectionTextFunc = null)
  1503	        {
  1504	            // The Text property of the control is updated
  1505	            var customText = multiSelectionTextFunc?.Invoke(selectedConvertedValues);
  1506	            await SetTextCoreAsync(customText);
  1507	
  1508	            // The comparison is made on the multiSelectionText variable
  1509	            if (_multiSelectionText != text)
  1510	            {
  1511	                _multiSelectionText = text;
  1512	                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_multiSelectionText))
  1513	                {
  1514	                    Touched = true;
  1515	                }
  1516	
  1517	                if (updateValue)
  1518	                {
  1519	                    await UpdateValuePropertyAsync(false);
  1520	                }
  1521	            }
  1522	        }
  1523	
  1524	        /// <remarks>
  1525	        /// If <see cref="ToStringFunc"/> is set, it is used to convert the value to a string; otherwise, the base implementation is used.
  1526	        /// </remarks>
  1527	        /// <inheritdoc />
  1528	        protected override string? ConvertSet(T? input)
  1529	        {
  1530	            return ToStringFunc is not null
  1531	                ? ToStringFunc(input)
  1532	                : base.ConvertSet(input);
  1533	        }
  1534	
  1535	        protected override Task UpdateValuePropertyAsync(bool updateText)
  1536	        {
  1537	            // For MultiSelection of non-string T's we don't update the Value!!!
  1538	            if (typeof(T) == typeof(string) || !MultiSelection)
  1539	            {
  1540	                base.UpdateValuePropertyAsync(updateText);
  1541	            }
  1542	
  1543	            return Task.CompletedTask;
  1544	        }
  1545	
  1546	        protected override Task UpdateTextPropertyAsync(bool updateValue)
  1547	        {
  1548	            // when multiselection is true, we return
  1549	            // a comma separated list of selected values
  1550	            if (MultiSelectionTextFunc != null)
  1551	            {
  1552	                return MultiSelection
  1553	                    ? SetCustomizedTextAsync(string.Join(Delimiter, _selectedValues.Select(ConvertSet)),
  1554	                        selectedConvertedValues: _selectedValues.Select(ConvertSet).ToList(),
  1555	                        multiSelectionTextFunc: MultiSelectionTextFunc)
  1556	                    : base.UpdateTextPropertyAsync(updateValue);
  1557	            }
  1558	
  1559	            return MultiSelection
  1560	                ? SetTextAndUpdateValueAsync(string.Join(Delimiter, _selectedValues.Select(ConvertSet)))
  1561	                : base.UpdateTextPropertyAsync(updateValue);
  1562	        }
  1563	
  1564	        /// <summary>
  1565	        /// Clears all selections and resets validation
  1566	        /// </summary>
  1567	        /// <remarks>
  1568	        /// To maintain validation errors (e.g. required), use <see cref="ClearAsync"/>
  1569	        /// </remarks>
  1570	        protected override async Task ResetValueAsync()
  1571	        {
  1572	            await ClearAsync();
  1573	            await base.ResetValueAsync();
  1574	        }
  1575	
  1576	        /// <summary>
  1577	        /// Gets whether the value is currently selected.
  1578	        /// </summary>
  1579	        /// <param name="value">The value to test.</param>
  1580	        /// <returns>When <c>true</c>, the specified value exists in <see cref="SelectedValues"/>.</returns>
  1581	        protected override bool HasValue(T? value)
  1582	        {
  1583	            // Fixes issue #4328
  1584	            if (MultiSelection)
  1585	            {
  1586	                return _selectedValues.Count != 0;
  1587	            }
  1588	
  1589	            return base.HasValue(value);
  1590	        }
  1591	
  1592	        /// <inheritdoc />
  1593	        protected override async ValueTask DisposeAsyncCore()
  1594	        {
  1595	            await base.DisposeAsyncCore();
  1596	
  1597	            if (IsJSRuntimeAvailable)
  1598	            {
  1599	                await KeyInterceptorService.UnsubscribeAsync(ElementId);
  1600	            }
  1601	        }
  1602	    }
  1603	}

     1	﻿using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components;
     2	using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web;
     3	using Microsoft.JSInterop;
     4	using MudBlazor.State;
     5	
     6	namespace MudBlazor
     7	{
     8	    /// <summary>
     9	    /// Represents a base class for designing form input components.
    10	    /// </summary>
    11	    /// <typeparam name="T">The type of item being input.</typeparam>
    12	    public abstract class MudBaseInput<T> : MudFormComponent<T, string>
    13	    {
    14	        private bool _isDirty;
    15	        /// <summary>
    16	        /// Prevents validation from occurring more than once during a validation cycle.
    17	        /// </summary>
    18	        /// <remarks>
    19	        /// This field is set to <c>true</c> to prevent validation from occurring more than once during a validation cycle.  Each change in the <see cref="Value"/> will reset this field to <c>false</c>.
    20	        /// </remarks>
    21	        private bool _validated;
    22	        protected bool _isFocused;
    23	        protected bool _forceTextUpdate;
    24	
    25	        /// <summary>
    26	        /// The resolved input element ID.
    27	        /// </summary>
    28	        protected string? InputElementId => _inputIdState.Value;
    29	        private string? _userAttributesId = Identifier.Create("mudinput");
    30	        private readonly string _componentId = Identifier.Create("mudinput");
    31	        private readonly ParameterState<string?> _textState;
    32	        private readonly ParameterState<T?> _valueState;
    33	        private readonly ParameterState<string?> _formatState;
    34	        private readonly ParameterState<string?> _inputIdState;
    35	
    36	        protected MudBaseInput()
    37	        {
    38	            using var registerScope = CreateRegisterScope();
    39	            _textState = registerScope.RegisterParameter<string?>(nameof(Text))
    40	                .WithParameter(() => Text)
    41	                .WithEventCallback(() => TextChanged)
    42	                .WithChangeHandler(OnTextParameterChangedAsync);
    43	            _valueState = registerScope.RegisterParameter<T?>(nameof(Value))
    44	                .WithParameter(() => Value)
    45	                .WithEventCallback(() => ValueChanged)
    46	                .WithChangeHandler(OnValueParameterChangedAsync);
    47	            _formatState = registerScope.RegisterParameter<string?>(nameof(Format))
    48	                .WithParameter(() => Format)
    49	                .WithChangeHandler(OnCultureAndFormatChangedAsync);
    50	            _inputIdState = registerScope.RegisterParameter<string?>(nameof(InputId))
    51	                .WithParameter(() => InputId)
    52	                .WithChangeHandler(UpdateInputIdStateAsync);
    53	        }
    54	
    55	        [Inject]
    56	        private IJSRuntime JsRuntime { get; set; } = null!;
    57	
    58	        /// <summary>
    59	        /// Allows the component to receive input.
    60	        /// </summary>
    61	        /// <remarks>
    62	        /// Defaults to <c>false</c>.
    63	        /// </remarks>
    64	        [Parameter]
    65	        [Category(CategoryTypes.FormComponent.Behavior)]
    66	        public bool Disabled { get; set; }
    67	
    68	        [CascadingParameter(Name = "ParentDisabled")]
    69	        private bool ParentDisabled { get; set; }
    70	
    71	        /// <summary>
    72	        /// Prevents the input from being changed by the user.
    73	        /// </summary>
    74	        /// <remarks>
    75	        /// Defaults to <c>false</c>.  When <c>true</c>, the user can copy text in the control, but cannot change the <see cref="Value" />.
    76	        /// </remarks>
    77	        [Parameter]
    78	        [Category(CategoryTypes.FormComponent.Behavior)]
    79	        public bool ReadOnly { get; set; }
    80

    82	        private bool ParentReadOnly { get; set; }

   428	        protected bool GetDisabledState() => Disabled || ParentDisabled;
   429	
   430	        protected bool GetReadOnlyState() => ReadOnly || ParentReadOnly;
   431	
   432	        /// <summary>
   433	        /// Occurs when the value has changed internally.
   434	        /// </summary>
   435	        /// <remarks>
   436	        /// This method is called when the <see cref="Text"/> property needs to be refreshed from current <see cref="Value" />.
   437	        /// </remarks>
   438	        protected virtual Task UpdateTextPropertyAsync(bool updateValue)
   439	        {
   440	            return SetTextAndUpdateValueAsync(ConvertSet(ReadValue), updateValue);
   441	        }
   442	
   443	        /// <summary>
   444	        /// When overridden, obtains focus for this input.
   445	        /// </summary>
   446	        /// <returns>A <see cref="ValueTask" /> object.</returns>
   447	        public virtual ValueTask FocusAsync() => ValueTask.CompletedTask;
   448	
   449	        /// <summary>
   450	        /// When overridden, releases focus from this input.
   451	        /// </summary>
   452	        /// <returns>A <see cref="ValueTask" /> object.</returns>
   453	        public virtual ValueTask BlurAsync() => ValueTask.CompletedTask;
   454	
   455	        /// <summary>
   456	        /// When overridden, selects this input.
   457	        /// </summary>
   458	        /// <returns>A <see cref="ValueTask" /> object.</returns>
   459	        public virtual ValueTask SelectAsync() => ValueTask.CompletedTask;
   460	
   461	        /// <summary>
   462	        /// When overridden, selects a portion of the input.
   463	        /// </summary>
   464	        /// <param name="pos1">The index of the first character to select.</param>
   465	        /// <param name="pos2">The index of the last character to select.</param>
   466	        /// <returns>A <see cref="ValueTask" /> object.</returns>
   467	        public virtual ValueTask SelectRangeAsync(int pos1, int pos2) => ValueTask.CompletedTask;
   468	
   469	        protected internal virtual async Task OnBlurredAsync(FocusEventArgs obj)
   470	        {
   471	            _isFocused = false;
   472	
   473	            if (ReadOnly)
   474	            {
   475	                return;
   476	            }
   477	
   478	            // all the OnBlur parents (TextField, MudMask, NumericField, DateRange, etc) currently point to this method
   479	            // which causes this method to be fired repeatedly, we can use the obj.Type of FocusedEventArgs to track it
   480	
   481	            if (!OnlyValidateIfDirty || _isDirty)
   482	            {
   483	                Touched = true;
   484	                if (_validated)
   485	                {
   486	                    if (OnBlur.HasDelegate)
   487	                    {
   488	                        obj.Type += ".additional";
   489	                        await OnBlur.InvokeAsync(obj);
   490	                    }
   491	                }
   492	                else
   493	                {
   494	                    if (OnBlur.HasDelegate)
   495	                    {
   496	                        obj.Type += ".additional";
   497	                        await BeginValidationAfterAsync(OnBlur.InvokeAsync(obj));
   498	                    }
   499	                    else
   500	                    {
   501	                        await ValidateValue();
   502	                    }
   503	                }
   504	            }
   505	        }
   506	
   507	        protected virtual Task InvokeKeyDownAsync(KeyboardEventArgs obj)
   508	        {
   509	            _isFocused = true;
   510	
   511	            return OnKeyDown.InvokeAsync(obj);
   512	        }
   513	
   514	        protected virtual Task InvokeKeyUpAsync(KeyboardEventArgs obj)
   515	        {
   516	            _isFocused = true;
   517	
   518	            return OnKeyUp.InvokeAsync(obj);
   519	        }
   520	
   521	        protected virtual async Task SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync(T? value, bool updateText = true, bool force = false)
   522	        {
   523	            var valueChanged = !EqualityComparer<T?>.Default.Equals(ReadValue, value);
   524	
   525	            if (!valueChanged && !force)
   526	            {
   527	                return;
   528	            }
   529	
   530	            _isDirty = true;
   531	            _validated = false;
   532	
   533	            // Use ParameterState to set Value instead of direct assignment
   534	            // This ensures proper parameter lifecycle management
   535	            await _valueState.SetValueAsync(value);
   536	
   537	            // If force is true but value hasn't changed, ParameterState won't fire the callback
   538	            // so we need to manually invoke it to maintain backward compatibility
   539	            if (force && !valueChanged)
   540	            {
   541	                await ValueChanged.InvokeAsync(value);
   542	            }
   543	
   544	            if (updateText)
   545	            {
   546	                await UpdateTextPropertyAsync(false);
   547	            }
   548	
   549	            FieldChanged(value);
   550	            await BeginValidateAsync();
   551	        }
   552	
   553	        private async Task OnValueParameterChangedAsync(ParameterChangedEventArgs<T?> arg)
   554	        {
   555	            _validated = false;
   556	            var wasTouched = Touched;
   557	
   558	            // When Value changes from parent, update Text from Value
   559	            // But only if Text is not also being set in the same parameter update
   560	            // Check ParameterView to see if Text is also present
   561	            if (!arg.ParameterView.Contains<string?>(nameof(Text)))
   562	            {
   563	                // Always update text when Value changes (TextUpdateSuppression removed)
   564	                _forceTextUpdate = false;
   565	                await UpdateTextPropertyAsync(false);
   566	            }
   567	
   568	            // Notify the form that the field has changed and trigger re-validation
   569	            // Only do this after the field has been touched.
   570	            if (wasTouched)
   571	            {
   572	                FieldChanged(arg.Value);
   573	                await BeginValidateAsync();
   574	            }
   575	        }
   576	
   577	        /// <summary>
   578	        /// Override to read Value from ParameterState instead of backing field.
   579	        /// </summary>
   580	        protected internal override T? ReadValue => _valueState.Value;
   581	
   582	        /// <summary>
   583	        /// Override to write Value to ParameterState instead of backing field.
   584	        /// </summary>
   585	        protected override Task SetValueCoreAsync(T? value) => _valueState.SetValueAsync(value);
   586	
   587	        /// <summary>
   588	        /// Occurs when the value has changed internally.
   589	        /// </summary>
   590	        /// <remarks>
   591	        /// This method is called when the <see cref="Value"/> property needs to be refreshed from current <see cref="Text" />.
   592	        /// </remarks>
   593	        protected virtual Task UpdateValuePropertyAsync(bool updateText)
   594	        {
   595	            return SetValueAndUpdateTextAsync(ConvertGet(ReadText), updateText);
   596	        }
   597	
   598	        protected override string? GetFormat() => _formatState.Value;
   599	
   600	        /// <inheritdoc />
   601	        protected override IConverter<T?, string?> GetDefaultConverter()
   602	        {
   603	            return new DefaultConverter<T>
   604	            {
   605	                Culture = GetCulture,
   606	                Format = GetFormat
   607	            };
   608	        }
   609	
   610	        /// <inheritdoc />
   611	        protected override async Task OnCultureAndFormatChangedAsync()
   612	        {
   613	            await base.OnCultureAndFormatChangedAsync();
   614	            await UpdateTextPropertyAsync(false);
   615	        }
   616	
   617	        /// <inheritdoc />
   618	        protected override async Task OnConverterChangedAsync()
   619	        {
   620	            await base.OnConverterChangedAsync();
   621	            await UpdateTextPropertyAsync(false);
   622	        }
   623	
   624	        protected override async Task ValidateValue()
   625	        {
   626	            if (SubscribeToParentForm)
   627	            {
   628	                _validated = true;
   629	                await base.ValidateValue();
   630	            }
   631	        }
   632	
   633	        protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
   634	        {
   635	            await base.OnInitializedAsync();
   636	
   637	            // Because the way the Value setter is built, it won't cause an update if the incoming Value is
   638	            // equal to the initial value. This is why we force an update to the Text property here.
   639	            if (typeof(T) != typeof(string) && string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(ReadText))
   640	            {
   641	                await UpdateTextPropertyAsync(false);
   642	            }
   643	
   644	            if (Label == null && For != null)
   645	            {
   646	                Label = For.GetLabelString();
   647	            }
   648	
   649	            _userAttributesId = UserAttributes.FirstOrDefault(userAttribute => userAttribute.Key.Equals("id", StringComparison.InvariantCultureIgnoreCase)).Value?.ToString();
   650	
   651	            if (_inputIdState.Value is null)
   652	            {
   653	                await UpdateInputIdStateAsync();
   654	            }
   655	        }
   656	
   657	        /// <summary>
   658	        /// Causes this input to be rerendered.
   659	        /// </summary>
   660	        /// <param name="forceTextUpdate">When <c>true</c>, the <see cref="Text"/> property will be updated before rendering.</param>
   661	        public virtual void ForceRender(bool forceTextUpdate)
   662	        {
   663	            _forceTextUpdate = true;
   664	            UpdateTextPropertyAsync(false).CatchAndLog();
   665	            StateHasChanged();
   666	        }
   667	
   668	        /// <inheritdoc />
   669	        public override async Task SetParametersAsync(ParameterView parameters)
   670	        {
   671	            var hasText = parameters.Contains<string>(nameof(Text));
   672	            var hasValue = parameters.Contains<T>(nameof(Value));
   673	            var currentValue = ReadValue;
   674	            await base.SetParametersAsync(parameters);
   675	
   676	            // Refresh Text from Value if Value is present but Text is not
   677	            // This maintains backward compatibility with the old `if (hasValue && !hasText)` logic
   678	            // ParameterState only fires OnValueParameterChangedAsync when value CHANGES,
   679	            // but we need to update Text even when Value is passed unchanged (for formatting)
   680	            if (hasValue && !hasText)
   681	            {
   682	                var valueChanged = !EqualityComparer<T?>.Default.Equals(currentValue, ReadValue);
   683	
   684	                // Preserve in-progress user text across parent rerenders until Value actually changes.
   685	                if (_isFocused && !valueChanged && !_forceTextUpdate)
   686	                {
   687	                    return;
   688	                }
   689	
   690	                // Always update text when Value changes (TextUpdateSuppression removed)
   691	                _forceTextUpdate = false;
   692	                await UpdateTextPropertyAsync(false);
   693	            }
   694	        }
   695	
   696	        /// <inheritdoc />
   697	        protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
   698	        {
   699	            //Only focus automatically after the first render cycle!
   700	            if (firstRender && AutoFocus)
   701	            {
   702	                await FocusAsync();
   703	            }
   704	
   705	            await base.OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender);
   706	        }
   707	
   708	        /// <inheritdoc />
   709	        protected override void OnParametersSet()
   710	        {
   711	            if (SubscribeToParentForm)
   712	            {
   713	                base.OnParametersSet();
   714	            }
   715	            else
   716	            {
   717	                // MudBlazor uses an unconventional SubscribeToParentForm mechanism whose behavior is not fully understandable.
   718	                // Because of this, we must manually call OnParametersSet on the ParameterContainer to ensure ParameterState fields update correctly.
   719	                //
   720	                // Without this manual call, scenarios involving inherited components can fall out of sync. For example:
   721	                // - Component1 inherits a base component that defines a state parameter.
   722	                // - Component2 also inherits that same base component, wraps Component1, and forwards its base parameters to Component1.
   723	                // In this case, ParameterState will not remain properly synchronized since base.OnParametersSet is called conditionally.
   724	                ParameterContainer.OnParametersSet();
   725	            }
   726	        }
   727	
   728	        /// <inheritdoc />
   729	        protected override async Task ResetValueAsync()
   730	        {
   731	            await SetTextAndUpdateValueAsync(null, updateValue: true);
   732	            _isDirty = false;
   733	            _validated = false;
   734	            await base.ResetValueAsync();
   735	        }
   736	
   737	        protected string? GetHelperId()
   738	        {
   739	            if (HelperId is not null)
   740	            {
   741	                return HelperId;
   742	            }
   743	
   744	            // error text replaces helper text in MudInputControl, so if the user does not provide a custom helper id, we have no valid helper element
   745	            if (HasErrors)
   746	            {
   747	                return null;
   748	            }
   749	
   750	            return HelperText is not null
   751	                ? $"{_inputIdState.Value}-helper-text"
   752	                : null;
   753	        }
   754	
   755	        protected string? GetAriaDescribedByString()
   756	        {
   757	            var errorId = HasErrors ? ErrorIdState.Value : null;
   758	            var helperId = GetHelperId();
   759	
   760	            return errorId is not null && helperId is not null
   761	                ? $"{errorId} {helperId}"
   762	                : errorId ?? helperId ?? null;
   763	        }
   764	
   765	        /// <summary>
   766	        /// The type of input received by this component.
   767	        /// </summary>
   768	        /// <remarks>
   769	        /// Defaults to <see cref="InputType.Text"/>.
   770	        /// </remarks>
   771	        protected internal virtual InputType GetInputType() => InputType.Text;
   772	
   773	        protected internal string? ReadText => _textState.Value;
   774	
   775	        protected Task SetTextCoreAsync(string? text) => _textState.SetValueAsync(text);
   776	
   777	        protected virtual async Task SetTextAndUpdateValueAsync(string? text, bool updateValue = true)
   778	        {
   779	            if (ReadText == text)
   780	            {
   781	                return;
   782	            }
   783	
   784	            _validated = false;
   785	
   786	            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(text))
   787	            {
   788	                Touched = true;
   789	            }
   790	
   791	            await _textState.SetValueAsync(text);
   792	            if (updateValue)
   793	            {
   794	                await UpdateValuePropertyAsync(false);
   795	            }
   796	        }
   797	
   798	        private async Task OnTextParameterChangedAsync(ParameterChangedEventArgs<string?> arg)
   799	        {
   800	            _validated = false;
   801	
   802	            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(arg.Value))
   803	            {
   804	                Touched = true;
   805	            }
   806	
   807	            // When Text changes from parent, update Value from Text using UpdateValuePropertyAsync
   808	            // But only if Value is not also being set in the same parameter update
   809	            // Check ParameterView to see if Value is also present
   810	            if (!arg.ParameterView.Contains<T?>(nameof(Value)))
   811	            {
   812	                await UpdateValuePropertyAsync(updateText: false);
   813	            }
   814	        }
   815	
   816	        private async Task UpdateInputIdStateAsync()
   817	        {
   818	            if (_inputIdState.Value is not null)
   819	            {
   820	                return;
   821	            }
   822	
   823	            if (_userAttributesId is not null)
   824	            {
   825	                await _inputIdState.SetValueAsync(_userAttributesId);
   826	                return;
   827	            }
   828	
   829	            await _inputIdState.SetValueAsync(_componentId);
   830	        }
   831	    }
   832	}

     9	using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components;
    10	using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Forms;
    11	using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
    12	using MudBlazor.Extensions;
    13	using MudBlazor.Interfaces;
    14	using MudBlazor.State;
    15	using MudBlazor.Utilities.Comparer;
